Author: namibj
Content: now that I'm no longer actively suffering from whatever that bread contained, let's hurry back to get this serializer worked on before anything is too late for it.

Author: namibj
Content:
VCO core, with enough fingers to let me tap off a single-finger feed to a clock tree without this causing undue load, probably do be aiming at exactly the 2.5 GHz though, maybe probably better like 3 GHz to handle a bit of layout parasitics and process variation.

Then clock buffer.
Then a latch fast enough to accomplish a DIV2 off of this.
Then a mux2 at least that would act as the final MUX in a C2 arrangement.
Then draw at least a plain serializer MUX tree up to have a fallback to submit; the base clock buf cells should be sufficient speed.

After, see how much time is left,
and see how good an inductor would be needed to clock the input-multiplexed current-mode C4 MUX (the pseudo-nmos style architecture of it).
If success, try to make an inductor that's good enough for pulling off a C4 architecture.
If success, go and implement the C4 with FIR taps furnished at the CLK/2 level (i.e., C8).

If inductor trials not success, instead go for some FIR taps at still CLK/2.

Author: 246tnt
Content: You're not targetting gf0p3 are you ?

Author: namibj
Content: Well, kinda; thanks for me realizing now that it's not a week but just 4 days.

Author: namibj
Content: Oscillation success:

Author: namibj
Content: clock buffer at FO4, though with limited fancyness of harness

Author: namibj
Content: food break; then a latch that can DIV2 off of that.

Author: namibj
Content: forward device's drain current density oscillating between approximately 16 and 72 A/m

Author: namibj
Content: thanks past-me for making a plan so present-me doesn't wander off of the minimum-viable-submission route.

Author: namibj
Content: pair of latches be DIV2-ing

Author: namibj
Content: 16 half speed latches @ approx 100 mW each + 4 full-speed latches @ approx 400 mW each + 4 full-speed MUX2 @ somewhere_between_those each, so a "total" of 3.6 ~ 4.8 mW, not counting the clock feed (quadrature phases at both full clock and half clock), and not counting the output predriver limiting amplifier

Author: namibj
Content: yeah I don't want to draw the rest by hand, real ugly to tune that way....
